basics.name: Jan Zheng
basics.label: AI Design Engineer & Bioinformatics Engineer
basics.summary:
AI design engineer with HCI background, specializing in rapid prototypes that solve real-world problems. Builds AI-powered automation systems that help scientists and researchers streamline their workflows. 

 Previously built software that supported 20+ phage therapy cases in a nation-wide clinical trial
basics.about: I have over a decade in user-centered product and UX design,  and full-stack prototype development. My work spans UX research to Figma prototypes, to full-stack JS in Vue/Svelte/React, deployed on Vercel, Cloudflare, or Fly. My last few years focused on Phage Directory, a community-driven crowd-sourced phage therapy project. We were key partners in creating an Australia-wide phage therapy clinical trial, and helped treat ~20 patients. Recently, I've been building experimental LLM tools like generative UI and finite state machine agents.

work.name: Westmead Institute for Medical Research / Phage Australia
work.description: Built data collection pipelines, aggregating clinical, wet lab, & genomics data for an Australia-wide phage therapy trial, on tools like REDCap, Cloudflare Workers, Vercel, and Sveltekit. Also worked on LLMs for schema inferencing and structuring, and prototyped tools for recording lab notebook data.

work.name: Phage Directory
work.description: Community of 1000+ phage researchers, we connect patients with phage therapy, and have treated 3 patients. We build valuable phage tools and run conferences, and our success led to an Australia-wide phage therapy clinical trial. Our trial successfully treated 16+ patients in 2023.

work.name: Ubiquiti Networks
work.description: Designed and built a support-centric community / forum / 'social network' for Ubiquiti’s core users.

work.name: nurun
work.description: Guided campaign requirements and strategy; created user flows, wireframes, and interactive protototypes for clients like Nespresso, Assurant, Gas South, and The Home Depot.

work.name: Moxie Interactive
work.description: Focused on web and mobile experiences, information architecture, and conversion funnels, for clients like Verizon Wireless, Cartoon Network, Coca-Cola, L'Oreal, and BBC America.

skills.name: Product Design
skills.description: Coming from user-centered design and service design, I'm also comfortable talking to customers and design the whole picture. I'm equally comfortable designing in Figma, SCSS, or JS/Python, which is handy for API, Gen AI/UI, and LLM-centric design.

skills.name: Software Development
skills.description: I've previously designed and built interfaces in Svelte/Vue/React, and backend in Express/Hono/FastAPI, and deployed on Fly.io, Vercel, and Cloudflare.
